title: Oerstedella adolphii
taxonomy: Oerstedella adolphii is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This epiphytic orchid is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Oerstedella adolphii is within the subfamily Orchidoideae, specifically in the tribe Maxillarieae. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other orchid species. Further research is needed to confirm the precise classification and relationships within the orchid family.
